title: Bug: divide function doesn't handle division by zero
body:
## Bug Report

The `divide` function in `src/math.ts` returns `Infinity` when dividing by zero instead of throwing an error.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Call `divide(10, 0)`
2. Returns `Infinity` instead of throwing

## Expected Behavior
Should throw an Error with message 'Division by zero'

## Actual Behavior
Returns `Infinity`
